title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kid, Big Mom, Kaido, King as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...Pulling us in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wahah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sick of these steel beams running their mouths!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Just obey my magnetic fields already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You can still stand,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: KID?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: PANT... PANT ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess you kids are hell bent on taking my head...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha... It's weird, I feel like I have a new reason to keep fightin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet you anything Kaido is reaching his limit up there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you give it long enough, even mountains can be worn down by rain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They say you emperors are invincible?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What a joke. There's no such thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Punk Corna D10!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: JOUGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's a massive bull!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's even bigger than big mom in her giant form!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Listen up, you HAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I don't care if it kills me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...you're not reaching that roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're putting their lives on the line!!!! Next issue, cover and color spread!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
